title: 3 Unsolved Signals from Space

segments.text: In 1977, a signal from space blew our minds.
And it still has scientists puzzled today.
First is the Wow! Signal, a burst lasting just 72 seconds.
It came from Sagittarius and remains unaccounted for.
Next, fast radio bursts—unique signals from unknown sources.
They flash and vanish, leaving us with more questions.
Finally, the 'LGM-1' signal from a distant pulsar.
It was the first detected, yet its true nature is still a mystery.
What other signals are we not hearing?
Follow for mysteries we still can't explain.

description: The cosmos is whispering secrets we can't decipher. Follow for daily mysteries! 🌌
